final_answer:
To find the winner of the last F1 race, we need to look for the most recent dated event in the provided content. The relevant information is found in the "Last win" column of the table. 

The most recent win is mentioned for Lewis Hamilton with the "2026 Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix". Another recent win is mentioned for George Russell with the "2026 Austrian Grand Prix". Since the "2026 Austrian Grand Prix" is more recent than the "2026 Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix" in the context of the F1 season schedule, which typically progresses chronologically, we can infer that the "2026 Austrian Grand Prix" is the most recent race mentioned.

Therefore, the winner of the last F1 race, based on the provided data, is George Russell, who won the 2026 Austrian Grand Prix.
